title: Air Wick Ginger Mandarin Reed Diffuser 42ml, Natural Essential Oils, Long-Lasting Eco-Friendly Aromatherapy, Sustainable Citrus Fragrance, Recyclable, Home Kitchen, Lasts up to 6 weeks
features: CREATE A WELCOMING ATMOSPHERE: Bask in the aromatic and warming ginger scent with a bright, citrusy freshness of mandarin

INFUSED WITH ESSENTIAL OILS: Surround yourself in the inviting scents of our nature-inspired fragrances, infused with natural essential oils which neutralise malodours in the kitchen, bathroom and living room
NATURE INSPIRED: Airwick Reed Diffusers use natural rattan stems to delicately diffuse wonderful long-lasting fragrance and improve your home fragrance for up to 6 weeks
LONG LASTING FRAGRANCE FOR UP TO 6 WEEKS: Scented liquid included in bottle lasts up to six weeks
Available in other fragrances. Recycle when empty
description: From the manufacturer Neutralises pet and kitchen odours The Air Wick Reed Diffuser diffuses fragrance naturally, without the need for batteries or heating elements. Elegant home-friendly design Place the Reed Diffuser anywhere in your home and the natural rattan stems will release Air Wick’s fragrances.
